report.summary: Community growth cycle v17 (evening): Drafted 6 social posts (Monday market outlook, SEC 16 digital commodities breakdown, 30+ guide content drop, miner capitulation 5-part thread, SEC poll, weekend stablecoin alpha), full weekly newsletter for Thu Mar 27, Discord/TG announcement, and created 2 branded SVG social cards (Miner Capitulation Phase + SEC 16 Digital Commodities). Market data: BTC $68,302 (tested support, bounced to $70,600), ETH $2,057, Fear & Greed at 8, $400M+ liquidations, miner capitulation triggered, oil at $112, SEC/CFTC classified 16 tokens as digital commodities.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #43: Monday Market Outlook — BTC $68,302→$70,600 rebound, F&G at 8, $400M+ liquidations, miner capitulation starting, SEC 16 digital commodities, fear-greed tool link (Schedule Mon PM Mar 23)

Tweet #44: SEC Digital Commodities Deep Dive — all 16 tokens listed (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA, LINK, AVAX, DOT, XLM, HBAR, LTC, DOGE, SHIB, XTZ, APT, ALGO), CFTC jurisdiction implications, ETF pathway, CLARITY Act pending, full guide link (Schedule Tue Mar 24)
Tweet #45: 30+ New Guides Content Drop — flash loans, Fusaka, Firedancer, zkML, Bitcoin covenants, MiCA, tokenized gold, all free no signup (Schedule Wed Mar 25)

Tweet #46: Thread (5 parts) — Miner Capitulation Explained: hash ribbons signal, why it's happening (energy costs $112 oil, post-halving compression), historical precedent, this cycle's twist (SEC commodity classification + ETF floor), buy signal since 2012 (Schedule Thu Mar 26)
Tweet #47: Engagement Poll — which of 4 tokens (SOL, XRP, ADA, LINK) benefits most from SEC commodity classification (Schedule Fri Mar 27)
Tweet #48: Weekend Alpha — stablecoin supply ATH as leading indicator, F&G at 8, miner capitulation, $400M liquidations cleaned leveraged longs, dry powder accumulating (Schedule Sat Mar 28)

Newsletter v10: Full weekly digest for Thu Mar 27 — market pulse (BTC $68,302, ETH $2,057, F&G at 8, miner capitulation), SEC digital commodities deep section, 30+ new guides + 5 ecosystem deep-dives, worth reading picks (supply shock, stablecoin yield, tokenized gold), degen corner on stablecoin supply ATH signal
Discord/TG announcement: 30+ new learn guides + 5 ecosystem deep-dives (Chainlink, dYdX, GMX, Ethena, Jupiter) + crypto cards & loans expansion + SEC commodity guide
Content calendar v14 — 6 posts scheduled Mar 23–28 across Twitter/Discord/Email

sections.title: Market Intelligence Used
items: BTC: $68,302 — tested support after Iran-related selloff, bounced to $70,600 after Trump delayed Iran strikes 5 days; Fear & Greed at 8 (Extreme Fear)
ETH: $2,057 — holding above $2,000 support; BTC dominance at 58.74%; ETH down 10.67% weekly
Liquidations: $400M+ in 24h ($243M long liquidations); leveraged positions cleaned out; CME gap near $70K
Mining: Miner capitulation phase triggered — Hash Ribbons crossed; energy costs spiking with oil at $112; post-halving revenue compression

Regulatory: SEC + CFTC classified 16 cryptos as digital commodities (BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, ADA, LINK, AVAX, DOT, XLM, HBAR, LTC, DOGE, SHIB, XTZ, APT, ALGO) — commodity = CFTC jurisdiction, lighter regulation, ETF pathway
Stablecoins: Supply at ATH — historically precedes rallies by 2-4 weeks; dry powder accumulating despite extreme fear
Privacy tokens: DASH, NIGHT, XMR up 3-5% bucking bearish trend
SUI: Institutional momentum — 2x ETF on Nasdaq, Grayscale trust S-1 filed; approaching critical breakout zone

Content published today: 30+ new learn guides, 5 ecosystem deep-dives (Chainlink, dYdX, GMX, Ethena, Jupiter), crypto cards & loans expansion, tokenized gold & AMM guides, risk/security/RWA/gaming guides
